chassis_topology: single aluminum plate with battery bay, electronics bay, sensor mast

sensor_placement.thermal_camera: top of sensor mast, forward-facing, beside RGB
sensor_placement.lidar_2d: front chassis edge, 150 mm above floor

rationale: Skid-steer 4-wheel: simplest reliable drivetrain for flat industrial floors; no steering linkage to design or fail.
Battery sized from avg draw ~42 W x 8.0 h / 0.9 usable x 1.2 margin = 451 Wh -> 512 Wh pack.
LiFePO4 over Li-ion: safer chemistry for unattended industrial operation, longer cycle life, at a mass penalty.
Al 6061 plate chassis: stiff, cheap, machinable anywhere, well-known allowables.
Motors chosen with torque headroom; verified quantitatively in simulation stage.
